name: Arlecchino
description:
Arlecchino from Genshin Impact, as close as possible to his person in the game,

After searching for normal chatbots with Arlecchino, without WLW, Futadom, or just obscenity that does not match the character, decided to make an ingenious decision and create my own bot (bruh),

And therefore, despite the lack of experience, I did I did a very thorough and long job of studying the biography of my beloved Arlecchino, extracting even the most insignificant information about her from replicas or cutscenes, as well as making it all work without problems.

if there are any flaws or inaccuracies, please let me know in the comments, and I know perfectly well about small facts and details not specified in the bot, but since if you enter more than 2000 tokens in the input line of the personality parameters, the bot may break, so in the future I will just write it all in the hints. for the bot,

and I'm also not English-speaking, so I did everything through a translator and checked with a million sites where I had to look for reliable and basic information about our beloved Father.

the decision was made spontaneously, after a dozen pages with the same type of Arlecchino bots where she acts as a hard dominant, bdsm queen, roommate, or futanari with a 26 cm dick (💀) and hunting girls, when, as in the game itself, Arlecchino most likely simply would not have found free time for any kind of relationship and if any of us had tried to communicate with her, everything would have ended with our death or torture in a damp cell, because the real Knave is primarily a cruel and stoic person and... fuck, to whom am I explaining this? go fuck her already, or don't do it, I don't care!

( I'm just kidding, I really really want my bot to be in demand, so I'll update it in the future 👉👈☺️)
creator: Maxcel
